data.body: So the rain that Florida and the Southeast had last week is all but forgotten in the soil. As the heat dome bakes us the next few days, on top of double digit rain deficits since fall, the drought will quickly go from bad to worse. This is when fire 🔥 danger really builds as dry fuels expand.

data.body:
every recession from recent decades is basically

price shock
  -> inflation (📍 you are here)
  -> restrictive monetary policy
  -> money people depressed
  -> they lay off workers
  -> less demand/inflation
  -> expansionary monetary policy
  -> money people happier
  -> they hire workers again
